title: Homeland Security Analysis
public_claim: Homeland Security Analysis is presented as a intelligence-method and security-analysis page.
distinctive_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from intelligence question to method selection, evidence weighting, competing hypotheses, bias control, judgment output, and review gate. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
